titleStmt.title: SII 29.57: original edition by P. N. Narasimha Murthy
No. 57. (A.R. No. B. 785 of 1962-63.) HARSŪR, GULBARGA TALUK AND DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab lying on to the left side [outside] the Parvatadēva temple.

It belongs to the reign period of Tribhuvanamalladēva and the record carries his genealogy. Somēśvara III, his son Perma-Jagadēkamalla and Taila II [brother of Somēśvara III] are also mentioned in the record.

The inscription also has mentioned Bammaṇayya, the feudatory chief of Jagadēkamalla, his wife Lakkādēvi and Hemmāḍidēva (their son). The record intends to highlight the works and greatness of the family of Bhāskara-seṭṭi and Sāgara-seṭṭi. Some information regarding this cannot be made out properly since the record is damaged. There seems to be a reference to Kēdārēśvara and Bankēśa.

It has registered a grant of land for the worship and offerings to god Bāḷēśvara by Goṅkarasa of Goṅka-nāḍu Nāmarasa, the prabhu of Sīmaḷa, and Kēti-seṭṭi, a jewel of the Vaiśyakula. The hiriya daṇḍanāyaka Baṁmaṇayya, his son by wife Lakkhā-dēvi, Hemmāḍi-arasa and the mahājanas [of Sīmaḷa] were entrusted with the duties and responsibilities of managing this dharma. The temple of Bāḷeśvara was constructed in the place Sāleya-Sīmaḷa. It is said that this place was situated in Goṅka-nāḍu, a sub-division of Alande-1000 in Kuntaḷa-Janapada. The record written by Mallōja.
This record is dated in the regnal year 21 of Chālukya Tribhuvanamalla, Īśvara, Pushya ba. 3, Thursday, uttarāyaṇa saṅkrānti. It corresponds to 1097 A.D., December 24, Thursday, f.d.t. 33.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī ramaṇīvara vistāra dinamaḷa surasadidvāra nika pra
stuta sarasvatī parahasti mukhakuḍugavara mahā(ga)mata mudadiṁ .
vanaṁtākṣana nābhikūpanaṇi(ṇa)prōtharādacitaṁ virēcana nātaṁge sutaṁ ma
navanī baṁmāṁḍavānātage daṁḍanaha ritanāmādi napratima
dēva nimittaṁ jaḷadiṁ ma laṁ jaḷabrāta (dōḷūradu) . maḷarahi
ta mattamā (ji)da cāpaka dārā di neṁdū munivarakalluṁbuduka nṛpa (nēca)
tasaraṁ taḷadiru śānepa kuḍḍalukā nṛpa ṁ . cāḷukya rā diṣaḷalukaṁ phala
renisi nṛparidagēyaṁ Ajayinutiddiṁ gēyaṁ bāḷaṁdudara pravāsana pratirūpaṁ .
puna śauryya tailaca grīvāneya paṭṭā bhiśrayaṁ tadyakṣāśana naṁdana vikramayyaṇaṁ
taṁmanutāṁ jayasiṁhadēvaruṁ . Āhavamallakṣiti haṁpura
daṁtadurvvarādi (pata) neyaṁ (bā) puḷi sōmanavaṁsā sanātananuja pe
rmmāḍi nṛpaṁ . Ānṛpana taneya sōma hi nāthaṁ tanṛpāḷa naṁdana jagadēkā nṛpa
nātana taṁmaṁ dāni śrītaila ca(kra) cakrīlalāmaṁ . Akarāya maraditā
dita caraṇaṁ jagadēkamalla nṛpanara neyā(ḷsu)ra maṁtri sadṛḍha menipaṁ dhareyō
ḷu śrībaṁmaṇayya daṁḍādhīśaṁ . baṁma camūpatigaṁ varalakhkhādēvijananigeṁ
puṭṭida suṁdara rūpa tanayaṣaṁṇṇavati dhāreya heṁmmāḍidēva ma mage kā(va) .
svasti samadhigata paṁca mahāśabda mahāsāmaṁtādhipati mahāśrī caṁḍa daṁḍanāya
kaṁ śiṣṭa jana pradāyakaṁ vitara vikramāditya budhajana stutya baṁdhujana ku
mudacaṁdra vi cāmarēṁdra sakaḷa ga samudra Ā va rudraṁppāya śōḷihaṁ (brā)
ku jana triṇētraṁ kalla tāpada krī śrīdhara vainatēya śōbhagāṁgēya śrīmajjagadēka
malladēva pādārādhakaṁ ripubaḷa pāda kuṁjaraṁ di samasta praśasti sahitaṁ śrī manmahā pradā
na hiriya daṁḍanāyakaṁ baṁmaṇayya(ṁ)gaḷu . kaṁ . Inteseva ba(ṁ)maṇayya namanta pratiye
nipa vipra saṁtabbigarikaṁ māntesededitta kalisōma siyāntarhataṁ ma . vara
jaṁbūdvīpadoḷā bharatā vaniyalli kuntaḷa janapada doḷaṁ mesedalaṁde sārsbige piridadu
goṁka nāḍu janaparipūrṇnaṁ . Adaṟiṁda sīmaḷa budanāri murāri paṁkaja jīyaṁ
gṛhadiṁ padaṟaṁjinapadanaṁgaḍasadamaḷadē raḷake bhayadinaḻi ramaṇīyaṁ viprasaṁ
kuḷamellanūṟeva janaṁ padedanipa llidaru ṣōvaṁna . śrīma daśaṣṭi śāstrā
. svastiyama niyama svādhyāya dyānurāgiṇa mo ṇa japa samādhi śrī
ḷa saṁpaṁnaru ma brāhmyā bhōjadi kararuṁ śiṣṭa jana kumuda sudhākararu A[mu-]
pāsānāgni hōtra dvija guru dēva pūja tsaratuṁ dā dāṁ baṁḍa pāṁḍura ni
rpaḷa kīrttiyutaruṁ samasta śāṣtrā pārāvāra pārugaruṁ śrī murōda pādōka pavitrī
kritōtta māṁgaru menippa śrī matsarvva namaśyadagrahāra sāleyasīmaḷa va
janaṁgaḷ . v® . śrīvibhurati seṭṭi puruṣāgra gavadu kāḷakabbegaṇa vīra mābiseṭṭiyana
ja vinayāṁbudi kāḷiseṭṭiyuṁ tāvavari ḷidiya baṁmaṇaseṭṭiya sāgarayyanu śrī
viḷita prasīdu yaśa bhāskara seṭṭiyu vi tu puṭṭidā pa . kaṁ . varavibudha kammacāru bhāskara neni
sidaṁ bhāskarayyanu guṇaratuna doreko sāgaraṁ sagaraseṭṭiyu mittu dharmmamakke ke
ḍisidare . v® . Idusehvāvaṟāṁcāḷiseṭṭi
ni dani bāḷēśvarāvāsa malla ḷu prāraṁbha māḍi
da mādaṁ bhōga māḍisida kēdārēśvarā . kaṁ . baṁkēśa
sapta sū śritataṇivāṇi yā seṭṭi bhāskarayya
kra tāga . svastiśrīmaścāḷukya cakravartti tribhuvanamalladēvara varṣa 21 neya yī
śvara saṁvatsarada puṣya ba 3 brihavāra daṁduttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyalu goṁkanāḍu ya
goṁkarasanuṁ sīmaḷa prabhunāmarasanuṁ mattaśēṣa prabhugaḷu vaisyakuḷakumuda sudhā
karaneniṟpada guṇi doḍamaṇiya kētiseṭṭiyaru sarvvanamaśya śrī bāḷēśvara dēvargge pūjā
rttha māḍiṁ baḍaga dādi mattareradaṁ bi daṁ kālēkālē pālaniyō yaṁba vākyārttha
baṁmaṇayya hiriya daṁḍanāyakaru lakhkhādēviya kumāra hemmāḍi dēvarasaru
— madaśēṣa mahājanamuṁ dharmmamaṁ pratipāḷisuvudu kkē tāraṁbara raṁ śrī
da . sthada matārvvanadaṁ pa bhāgade nadharmmaduniṁ sarvvajña śaṁbhuvaṁ bage sa
śrīviṣṇu dya rakṣi suge Amaṁñaka pārvvatīśa śāsana mudadiṁ malliseṭṭi naṁdana vi
neyābha sideyallapara mābiseṭṭaṟu nuḍidāta kṛti jagakaḷaṁ dhṛti yalutē . mallōjara baraha .
Digital edition of SII 29.57 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
